name: Operators Academy
description: AI-powered operator stack: Claude Code workflows, 25 marketing skills, agents, and OpenClaw integration.

skills.description: Audit and optimize any web page for conversions using a 7-point framework
Optimize account creation and trial activation flows
Improve first-run experience to reduce churn
Reduce form fields, add smart defaults, use conditional logic
Create exit-intent popups, lead magnets, and promotional overlays
Generate high-converting copy for any page type using proven frameworks
Polish, tighten, and improve existing marketing copy
Build welcome, nurture, and re-engagement email sequences
Create platform-native social media content
Audit technical SEO, on-page SEO, indexation, and content gaps
Create hundreds of optimized pages from 12 playbook templates
Add structured data for rich search results
Create comparison and alternatives pages targeting competitor traffic
Create and manage paid advertising campaigns
Plan content calendars and distribution strategies
Plan and execute product launches
Set up event tracking, funnels, and attribution
Design and implement A/B tests with statistical rigor
Design viral referral loops and incentive structures
Build free tools that drive organic traffic and signups
Generate and rank marketing ideas by effort vs impact
Optimize pricing models, tiers, and positioning
Apply behavioral psychology principles to marketing
Create the foundation document all other skills reference

trigger_phrases.lets_continue: Reads docs and resumes where you left off

agents.description: Root cause analysis and bug isolation

prompt_flows.name: Launch a Product from Scratch
prompt_flows.description: Go from zero to a fully marketed product in one session.
steps: Create my product marketing context document
Write homepage copy for [product name]
Run a CRO audit on my homepage copy
Build a 5-email welcome sequence
Run an SEO audit and create a 90-day content strategy
Generate 3 comparison pages vs top competitors

prompt_flows.name: Competitor Traffic Capture
prompt_flows.description: Steal competitor search traffic with targeted pages and ads.
steps: Analyze these competitors: [list competitors]
Generate [product] vs [competitor] comparison pages for each
Write a '[competitor] alternatives' page positioning us as #1
Create Google Ads targeting competitor brand terms
Add schema markup to all comparison pages

prompt_flows.name: Build an SEO Content Engine
prompt_flows.description: Create a scalable system for organic traffic growth.
steps: Run a full SEO audit on my site
Identify the best programmatic SEO playbooks for my business
Generate the first batch of 20 pages using the [playbook] template
Add schema markup to all generated pages
Create a 90-day content strategy to support the pages

prompt_flows.name: Conversion Rate Optimization Sprint
prompt_flows.description: Audit and optimize your entire funnel in one session.
steps: Run a CRO audit on [URL]
Audit my signup flow for conversion blockers
Optimize my onboarding experience for new users
Create exit-intent popups for my top 3 pages
Design A/B tests for the top 3 CRO recommendations

prompt_flows.name: Build a Growth Loop
prompt_flows.description: Design viral mechanics and compounding growth channels.
steps: Design a referral program for [product]
Build a free tool strategy to drive organic signups
Generate 50 marketing ideas ranked by effort vs impact
Create a launch strategy for the referral program
Set up analytics tracking for the referral funnel

prompt_flows.name: Build an Email Marketing Machine
prompt_flows.description: Create automated email sequences for every stage of the customer journey.
steps: Build a 5-email welcome sequence for new signups
Create a 6-email lead nurture sequence for free trial users
Write a 4-email re-engagement sequence for churned users
Design a product launch email series (5 emails)
Set up analytics tracking for email conversion events
